environment.note: Uses netCDF4 and NumPy only; no JAX/CUDA/model execution.

HGT.evidence: GPU h1 terrain is byte-exact to the run-root wrfinput; CPU wrfout h0/h1 are byte-exact to each other but differ from wrfinput.

MUB.evidence: CPU and GPU wrfinputs are exact and CPU base field is h0-h1 static, but fresh GPU h1 differs from its native wrfinput. The writer reconstructs this base field from evolved total-minus-perturbation state at output time, so this is a one-hour state-split symptom rather than a static input mismatch.

PB.evidence: CPU and GPU wrfinputs are exact and CPU base field is h0-h1 static, but fresh GPU h1 differs from its native wrfinput. The writer reconstructs this base field from evolved total-minus-perturbation state at output time, so this is a one-hour state-split symptom rather than a static input mismatch.

PHB.evidence: CPU wrfout h0/h1 PHB are static but differ from wrfinput; fresh GPU h1 follows wrfinput to fp32 writer roundoff (max_abs 0.015625).

XLAT.evidence: CPU wrfinput/wrfout lat-lon are exact, but fresh GPU h1 is byte-exact to the writer projection fallback generated from GPU writer attrs, not to wrfinput.

XLONG.evidence: CPU wrfinput/wrfout lat-lon are exact, but fresh GPU h1 is byte-exact to the writer projection fallback generated from GPU writer attrs, not to wrfinput.

cpu_wrfinput.description: base state dry air mass in column

cpu_wrfout_h0.description: base state dry air mass in column

cpu_wrfout_h1.description: base state dry air mass in column

gpu_native_wrfinput.description: base state dry air mass in column

gpu_wrfout_h1.description: base state dry air mass in column

gpu_wrfout_h1.TITLE: OUTPUT FROM GPUWRF WRF-COMPATIBLE NETCDF WRITER

same_state_localization.note: PB/MUB should not block same-state localization as static/base source mismatches; they are h1 evolved state-split symptoms to localize in the dynamic pass.

XLAT.method: wrfout_writer._latlon_fields projection fallback: centered linear lat/lon grid from CEN_LAT/CEN_LON/DX/DY when State lacks lat/lon

XLONG.method: wrfout_writer._latlon_fields projection fallback: centered linear lat/lon grid from CEN_LAT/CEN_LON/DX/DY when State lacks lat/lon
